final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing infographic explaining definitions and relationships between AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, distillation, and CLI.

Style/medium: needs a "手绘" (hand-drawn) aesthetic — references in the spirit of Edward Tufte's information design, 信息图 (infographic) illustration tradition, sketchnote visual thinking movement; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include visual hierarchy showing concept definitions and their interconnections
Subject: must include all 7 concepts: AI, MCP, AI Agent, OpenClaw, AI Skill, 蒸馏, CLI
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an approachable, educational atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn, sketch-like surface treatment — exact paper texture and line weight is yours
Text (verbatim): must include concept labels "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concepts and their relationships, must be图文并茂 (image-text combined) and浅显易懂 (easy to understand)
Avoid:
